recipes.title: Thai Basil Chicken (Pad Kra Pao)
recipes.excerpt: Thailand's true national comfort food — charred chicken thighs with garlic, bird's eye chilies, and holy basil, topped with a crispy-edged fried egg.

recipes.title: Moroccan Lamb & Chickpea Braise with Preserved Lemon
recipes.excerpt: Slow-braised lamb shoulder with ras el hanout, chickpeas, preserved lemon, and olives — a one-pot Moroccan classic that gets better the longer it sits.
